# Balanced Start

- MUST keep this short.

## Oversized Background

This section repeats operational detail across many sentences so the unbalanced section heuristic has a deterministic target. It describes release notes, triage habits, review preferences, naming conventions, branch hygiene, local setup, dependency history, testing rituals, formatting habits, ownership boundaries, debugging stories, planning notes, and repository folklore in one oversized block. It keeps expanding with guidance that would be more useful as separate focused sections because agents need scan-friendly rules. The section adds more words about migration history, prior failed approaches, staging environments, flaky checks, package manager choices, parser behavior, stack detection, audit scoring, fixture design, documentation style, handoff expectations, and team communication. It continues describing every topic in one place instead of separating workflow, testing, parser, and audit guidance. The result is intentionally much longer than nearby sections while still using deterministic plain text that does not depend on dates, randomness, or external services.

## Short Finish

- SHOULD keep this short too.
